title: olearia rugosa subsp. intermedia
intro: Olearia rugosa subsp. intermedia, also known as intermediate tree daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Olearia rugosa subsp. intermedia include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
